brand.name: Heruni Dict
brand.tagline: An ancient Armenian dictionary built on Paris Heruni's SSB methodology

home.title: Heruni Dict
home.subtitle: Every Armenian word decomposes into 162 ՏԲ roots — one letter, two-letter, or three-letter semantic units.
home.searchPlaceholder: Type an Armenian word to decompose
home.disclaimer: Heruni's method is an alternative etymological theory, not a settled part of mainstream academic etymology.
home.ssbExplainerBody: ՏԲ stands for «Տառերի կամ Տարրերի Բառարան» — literally 'Dictionary of Letters or Elements'. It is Paris Heruni's table of 162 semantic units: 39 single letters, 86 two-letter combinations, 37 three-letter combinations. Each one carries a small semantic core, and every Armenian word is built from a sequence of them.

roots.title: SSB Root Table
roots.subtitle: 162 semantic units — 39 single-letter + 86 two-letter + 37 three-letter
roots.ssbAbbrevBody: ՏԲ stands for «Տառերի կամ Տարրերի Բառարան» — literally 'Dictionary of Letters or Elements'. It is Heruni's 162-entry table of meaning-bearing units from which every Armenian word is built. Read the methodology page for the full story.
roots.transcribingNote: {have} of {total} have been transcribed from book pp. 111–113 so far. Editors are filling in the rest.
roots.noWordsYet: No words recorded yet using this root

words.title: Words
words.subtitle: Words decomposed with Heruni's method
words.classicalEmpty: Classical etymology has not been recorded yet.

search.title: Search
search.hint: Search the whole dictionary — Armenian, transliteration, or English.

wotd.title: Word of the day
wotd.subtitle: A new word each day, reconstructed with Heruni's method

welcome.title: Welcome 👋
welcome.lead: Hi there — how can I call you?
welcome.privacy: We only keep your name and a count of visits.

login.title: Sign in to Heruni Dict
login.lead: Please sign in before using the dictionary. We track visitor behaviour so editors can see which words people look up.
login.legacyWelcome: Welcome back, {name}. Please set a password for your account.
login.errorAccountExists: That email is already registered. Please sign in instead.

patterns.title: Rhetorical patterns
patterns.subtitle: Reconstruction templates distilled from Heruni's worked examples — the rhetorical shapes word meanings follow.
patterns.noWordsYet: No words are linked to this pattern yet.

decompose.title: Decompose any word
decompose.automaticNote: Automatic decomposition — not reviewed by an editor.
decompose.aiButton: Generate Heruni reconstruction with our algorithms
decompose.aiDisclaimer: This reconstruction was synthesized automatically by our algorithms working from the pattern catalogue. No editor has reviewed it yet. You can suggest it as a new entry.
decompose.aiError: Our algorithms could not produce a reconstruction.

submission.title: Submit a word
submission.intro: If you have a word you'd like to see in the dictionary, submit it below.
submission.thanks: Thank you. Your submission has been received.
